heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1711 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter except activities otherwise specified, to remain available until expended, $18,400,000 for each of fiscal years 2018 through 2023.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title VII of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title VII to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 105–277, div. C112 Stat. 2681–670section 1701 of this titleOct. 21, 1998
